title: Math Tricks
subtitle: Master math calculations with rapid calculation methods
levelLockedDesc: Complete the previous level to unlock this level.

trick14.step2: Add the rounded number ({temp2}) to the other number ({op1})
trick14.step3RoundUp: Since we added {temp3} in Step 1, subtract {temp3} from the result
trick14.step3RoundDown: Since we subtracted {temp3} in Step 1, add {temp3} to the result

trick11.step4: Combine all the results to get the final answer

trick15.step2: Subtract the rounded number ({temp2}) from the first number ({op1})
trick15.step3RoundUp: Since we added {temp3} in Step 1 (subtracted too much), add {temp3} back to the result
trick15.step3RoundDown: Since we subtracted {temp3} in Step 1 (haven't subtracted all yet), subtract {temp3} from the result

trick16.step1: Add one of the numbers ({op1}) to the ones digit of the other number ({digit})
trick16.step3: Multiply the ones digits of both numbers ({digit1} × {digit2})
trick16.step4: Add the result of Step 2 ({step2Val}) to the result of Step 3 ({step3Val})

trick18.step1: Multiply the tens digit ({tens}) by the tens digit plus one ({tens} + 1)
trick18.step3: Combine the results of Step 1 ({val1}) and Step 2 ({val2}) side-by-side

trick21.step1: Multiply the tens digits of both numbers ({tens1} × {tens2})
trick21.step2: Add the tens digits of both numbers ({tens1} + {tens2})
trick21.step3: Combine the results of Step 1 ({val1}) and Step 2 ({val2}) by adding them (carry over if the Step 2 result >= 10)
trick21.step4: Append the digit 1 to the end of the combined result
